# @byted/ai-paas-env

AI PaaS anvironment variable tool.

## bnpm
- https://bnpm.bytedance.net/package/@byted/ai-paas-env

## Getting Started

### Installation

```bash
yarn
```

### Usage

```typescript
import { inferAIPaaSRegion, AI_PAAS_REGION, ifProdNetwork } from '@byted/ai-paas-env';

const region = inferAIPaaSRegion();

if (region === AI_PAAS_REGION.CN) {
  console.log('In CN region');
}

if (ifProdNetwork()) {
  console.log('In production network');
}
```
